title: Express.js Introduction Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of its flexibility versus low-level HTTP module, the midddleware heart, and professional routing.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of Express.js in modern development?
options: A minimal and flexible web application framework for Node.js that provides a robust set of features for web and mobile applications.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which and/or what was the primarily heart of an Express.js application?
Which method in Express.js would you use to handle a GET request to the '/users' URL?
Which and/or what was the primarily benefit of using Express.js compared to the raw 'http' module?
options: Express provides a robust, pre-built set of features for routing, data parsing, and static file serving.

questions.question: Does following the 'Middleware' model help process and modify a request before it reaches the final route handler in Express?
options: Yes, by providing a way to run code or modify data (e.g., parsing JSON) early in the request cycle.
